steps.title: Identify the required meaning
steps.content: The phrase “the changes will likely have a greater impact” confirms that fragmentation must cause alterations to ecological processes, so the blank needs a verb expressing causation or production.

steps.title: Match the correct verb
steps.content: Engenders means to produce or give rise to, expressing exactly how fragmentation creates ecological alterations. The other three don't express causation: preempts means to prevent, subsumes means to categorize, and attenuates means to weaken. That matches choice A — A is correct.
